title: Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai
tagline: Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Brahmapureeswarar Temple or Thirukolili is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukkuvalai in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Brahmapureeswarar Temple or Thirukolili is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukkuvalai in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Brahmapureeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Vandamar Poonguzhali. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th-century-CE Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. There are many inscriptions associated with the temple indicating contributions from Cholas, Thanjavur Nayaks and Thanjavur Maratha

topPlaces.name: Vaimoornathar Temple, Tiruvaimur
topPlaces.description: Vaimoornathar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in Tiruvaimur in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is revered in the hymns of 7th-century-CE Tamil saivite poets, Appar and Campantar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam (No:124).

topPlaces.name: Sundaresvarar Temple, Kundayur
topPlaces.description: Sundaresvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Kundaiyur in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Thirukkuvalai
topPlaces.description: Thirukkuvalai is a village situated in Nagapattinam district of Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is known for the Brahmapureeswarar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Valivalam
topPlaces.description: Valivalam is a small town in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the Valivalam village have the new small man helping nature-made forest which is initiated by pasumai valivalam amaippu (environmental volunteers group) in July 2019 with 2500+ trees of 70-75 variety of species in nearly 20000 sq.ft of formerly degraded land by using akira miyawakki method, especially majority of fruit bearing species to attract birds.

topPlaces.name: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kaichinam.

topPlaces.name: Alathambadi
topPlaces.description: Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur
topPlaces.description: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at Kanrappur near Tiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Appar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Thalainayar
topPlaces.description: Thalainayar (also referred to as Talanayar) is a panchayat town in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is near Vedaranyam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai?
faq.a: Stays in Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vaimoornathar Temple, Tiruvaimur, Sundaresvarar Temple, Kundayur, Thirukkuvalai, Valivalam, Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple.
